title: Naruto Shippuden
overview: Naruto Uzumaki wants to be the best ninja in the land. He's done well so far, but with the Akatsuki threat looming, he must train harder than ever.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
overview: Yuji Itadori is a boy with tremendous physical strength, though he lives a completely ordinary high school life. One day, to save a classmate who has been attacked by curses, he eats the finger of Ryomen Sukuna, taking the curse into his own soul.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba
overview: It is the Taisho Period in Japan. Tanjiro, a kindhearted boy who sells charcoal for a living, finds his family slaughtered by a demon. To make matters worse, his younger sister Nezuko, the sole survivor, has been transformed into a demon herself.

title: One Piece
overview: Years ago, the fearsome Pirate King, Gol D. Roger was executed leaving a pile of treasures and the famous "One Piece" behind. Since then, many pirates have set sail to search for it, including Monkey D. Luffy, a boy who set out to become the new Pirate King.

title: Attack on Titan
overview: Several hundred years ago, humans were nearly exterminated by Titans. Titans are typically several stories tall, seem to have no intelligence, devour human beings and, worst of all, seem to do it for the pleasure rather than as a food source.

title: Death Note
overview: Light Yagami is an exceptionally talented high school student who finds a mysterious notebook, the "Death Note", which belongs to the Shinigami Ryuk. The notebook grants its user the ability to kill anyone whose name and face they know.

title: My Hero Academia
overview: In a world where eighty percent of the population has some kind of super-powered Quirk, Izuku Midoriya is one of the rare cases who is born without any powers, but still dreams of becoming a superhero.

title: Hunter x Hunter
overview: Gon Freecss aspires to become a Hunter, an exceptional being capable of greatness. With his friends, he embarks on an adventure to find his father, a legendary Hunter.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
overview: Edward and Alphonse Elric, two brothers living in a world where alchemy is a dominant science, attempt an illegal alchemical transmutation to bring their deceased mother back to life, with disastrous consequences.

title: Dragon Ball Z
overview: Five years after the events of Dragon Ball, Goku is a young adult and father to his son Gohan. Raditz, a Saiyan warrior, arrives on Earth to find Goku and reveal Goku's alien origin.

title: Pokémon
overview: Join Ash Ketchum and his partner Pikachu as they explore the world, catching and training Pokémon, competing in gym battles, and aiming to become Pokémon Masters.

title: Crayon Shin-chan
overview: Follow the misadventures of five-year-old Shinnosuke "Shin" Nohara and his parents, baby sister, dog, and friends in Kasukabe, Saitama Prefecture, Japan.

title: Doraemon
overview: Doraemon, a robotic cat from the 22nd century, is sent back in time to help a young boy named Nobita Nobi navigate the trials of daily life using futuristic gadgets from his pocket.

title: Detective Conan
overview: Shinichi Kudo, a brilliant high school detective, is poisoned by a mysterious criminal syndicate and transformed into a young child. Using the alias Conan Edogawa, he continues to solve cases while searching for a cure.

title: Bleach
overview: Ichigo Kurosaki is a teenager who can see ghosts. His life changes forever when he meets Rukia Kuchiki, a Soul Reaper, and accidentally inherits her powers to fight evil spirits known as Hollows.

title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
overview: In a war-torn world of elemental magic, a young boy named Aang awakens from a century-long sleep to undertake a dangerous quest to fulfill his destiny as the Avatar, bringing peace to the world.

title: Ben 10
overview: Ten-year-old Ben Tennyson finds a mysterious alien watch, the Omnitrix, which allows him to transform into ten different alien heroes, each with unique powers, to fight extraterrestrial threats.

title: Tom and Jerry
overview: The classic comedic adventures of Tom the cat and Jerry the mouse as they engage in endless chases, traps, and pranks.

title: SpongeBob SquarePants
overview: Deep in the Pacific Ocean in the subterranean city of Bikini Bottom lives a yellow sea sponge named SpongeBob SquarePants, who works as a fry cook at the Krusty Krab.

title: Phineas and Ferb
overview: Two stepbrothers construct grand, spectacular inventions in their backyard during summer vacation, while their pet platypus Perry acts as a secret agent fighting the evil Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

title: Adventure Time
overview: Twelve-year-old Finn and his magical dog Jake go on adventures in the Land of Ooo, encountering bizarre creatures, princesses, and magical forces.

title: Gravity Falls
overview: Twin brother and sister Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend their summer vacation with their eccentric Great Uncle Stan in Gravity Falls, Oregon, a mysterious town filled with paranormal secrets.

title: Rick and Morty
overview: An intelligent but unstable scientist named Rick Sanchez drags his anxious grandson Morty Smith on dangerous, dimension-hopping adventures across the universe.

title: Scooby-Doo, Where Are You!
overview: A group of teenage friends and their cowardly Great Dane Scooby-Doo travel in their Mystery Machine van solving mysteries involving ghosts, monsters, and spooky characters.

title: Courage the Cowardly Dog
overview: An anthropomorphic dog named Courage lives in the middle of Nowhere, Kansas, with his elderly owners Muriel and Eustace Bagge, defending them from creepy, supernatural threats.

title: Teen Titans
overview: A team of five teenaged superheroes—Robin, Starfire, Cyborg, Beast Boy, and Raven—protect Jump City from local and cosmic villains while dealing with the challenges of adolescence.

title: The Simpsons
overview: The satiric adventures of a working-class family in the misfit town of Springfield.

title: Regular Show
overview: Two blue jays named Mordecai and a raccoon named Rigby work as groundskeepers at a local park, spending their days trying to avoid actual work by any means necessary.

title: The Amazing World of Gumball
overview: The misadventures of twelve-year-old Gumball Watterson, a blue cat, and his adoptive brother Darwin, a goldfish, in the surreal town of Elmore.

title: Samurai Jack
overview: A feudal Japanese samurai who is sent into the far future by the shape-shifting demon Aku seeks to return to his own time and undo Aku's dystopian reign.

title: Batman: The Animated Series
overview: The Dark Knight battles crime and corruption in Gotham City, encountering iconic adversaries like the Joker, Harley Quinn, and Two-Face.

title: Spider-Man: The Animated Series
overview: Peter Parker balances his college life and photojournalism career with his secret identity as the web-slinging superhero Spider-Man, protecting New York City from powerful villains.

title: The Powerpuff Girls
overview: Three kindergarten-aged girls with superpowers—Blossom, Bubbles, and Buttercup—created by Professor Utonium, fight crime and save Townsville from villains like Mojo Jojo.

title: Dexter's Laboratory
overview: Dexter, a boy genius with a secret laboratory hidden behind his bedroom bookshelf, creates spectacular inventions while trying to keep his hyperactive sister Dee Dee from ruining them.

title: Ed, Edd n Eddy
overview: Three neighborhood boys named Ed, Edd, and Eddy concoct complex scams to extract money from their peers to buy their favorite treat: giant jawbreakers.

title: Johnny Bravo
overview: Johnny Bravo, a muscular, pompadoured, womanizing young man, constantly tries to get women to date him, but almost always fails miserably.

title: Codename: Kids Next Door
overview: Five ten-year-old kids operating from a high-tech treehouse combat adult tyranny and bad teen behavior using advanced 2x4 technology.

title: The Grim Adventures of Billy & Mandy
overview: A dimwitted boy named Billy and a cynical girl named Mandy win a limbo game against the Grim Reaper, forcing him to be their best friend forever.

title: Danny Phantom
overview: Fourteen-year-old Danny Fenton gains ghost powers after an accident in his parents' portal laboratory, becoming a half-human, half-ghost superhero who protects his town.

title: Fairly OddParents
overview: Ten-year-old Timmy Turner is granted two fairy godparents, Cosmo and Wanda, who grant his every wish, often leading to chaotic consequences.
